text: Physicists witness pinpricks of darkness moving faster than the speed of light — without breaking the laws of relativity - Live Science
fullText: For the first time, researchers measured singularities in combined light and sound waves moving faster than the speed of light. The findings have implications in fluid dynamics, optics and many other fields.

text: Why Congress is fighting over a central tool of American surveillance - NPR
fullText: Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act is responsible for a huge share of intel collected by the U.S. Lawmakers and civil liberties advocates are worried it enables warrantless spying on U.S. citizens.

text: China’s Export Growth Slowed Sharply in First Month of Iran War - Bloomberg.com
fullText: China’s export growth slowed sharply in March while imports surged, as seasonal factors added to the fallout of the war in Iran on global energy supply.

text: Eric Swalwell announces resignation from Congress - Axios
